---
title: "RAS_Author_Subject"
author: "Xiaoye Zhu"
date: "2026-06-20"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
if (requireNamespace("knitr", quietly = TRUE)) {
  knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
}
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# RAS author-subject-time network with LCSH subject headings
# Base R version: no external R packages are required.
# ============================================================
```

```{r}
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 1. Read data
# ------------------------------------------------------------

output_dir <- Sys.getenv("RAS_OUTPUT_DIR", "C:/ras_text_analysis")
if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) {
  dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)
}

source_override <- Sys.getenv("RAS_SOURCE_CSV", "")
output_suffix <- if (source_override != "") "_namecorrected" else ""
if (source_override != "") {
  file_in <- file.path(output_dir, "RAS_author_subject_year_1858-1948_utf8_simplified_namecorrected_lcsh.csv")
  backup_path <- file.path(output_dir, "RAS_author_subject_year_1858-1948_utf8_simplified_before_lcsh_namecorrected.csv")
} else {
  file_in <- "C:/ras_text_analysis/RAS_author_subject_year_1858-1948_utf8_simplified.csv"
  backup_path <- "C:/ras_text_analysis/RAS_author_subject_year_1858-1948_utf8_simplified_before_lcsh.csv"
}

if (!file.exists(backup_path)) {
  if (source_override != "") {
    file.copy(source_override, backup_path)
  } else {
    file.copy(file_in, backup_path)
  }
}

source_path <- if (source_override != "") source_override else if (file.exists(backup_path)) backup_path else file_in

parse_csv_line <- function(line) {
  chars <- strsplit(line, "", fixed = TRUE)[[1]]
  fields <- character()
  current <- character()
  in_quotes <- FALSE
  i <- 1

  while (i <= length(chars)) {
    ch <- chars[i]

    if (ch == "\"") {
      if (in_quotes && i < length(chars) && chars[i + 1] == "\"") {
        current <- c(current, "\"")
        i <- i + 1
      } else {
        in_quotes <- !in_quotes
      }
    } else if (ch == "," && !in_quotes) {
      fields <- c(fields, paste0(current, collapse = ""))
      current <- character()
    } else {
      current <- c(current, ch)
    }

    i <- i + 1
  }

  c(fields, paste0(current, collapse = ""))
}

read_ras_csv <- function(path) {
  lines <- readLines(path, encoding = "UTF-8", warn = FALSE)
  lines[1] <- sub("^\ufeff", "", lines[1])
  header <- parse_csv_line(lines[1])
  rows <- lapply(lines[-1], parse_csv_line)

  rows <- lapply(rows, function(x) {
    if (length(x) < length(header)) {
      x <- c(x, rep("", length(header) - length(x)))
    }
    if (length(x) > length(header)) {
      x <- c(x[seq_len(length(header) - 1)], paste(x[length(header):length(x)], collapse = ","))
    }
    x
  })

  out <- as.data.frame(do.call(rbind, rows), stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
  names(out) <- header
  out[out %in% c("NA", "N/A")] <- NA
  out
}

df_raw <- read_ras_csv(source_path)

str(df_raw)
```

```{r}
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 2. Basic cleaning
# ------------------------------------------------------------

squish <- function(x) {
  x <- ifelse(is.na(x), "", as.character(x))
  x <- gsub("\\s+", " ", x, perl = TRUE)
  trimws(x)
}

normalize_author_name <- function(x) {
  x <- squish(x)
  x <- gsub("^(trans\\.?|translated by)\\s+", "", x, ignore.case = TRUE, perl = TRUE)
  x <- gsub("\\s*-\\s*", "-", x, perl = TRUE)
  x <- gsub("\\s*'\\s*", "'", x, perl = TRUE)
  x <- gsub("\\s+,", ",", x, perl = TRUE)
  x <- gsub('^"\\s*Ardsheal\\s*"\\s*Sections.*$', "Ardsheal", x, ignore.case = TRUE, perl = TRUE)
  aliases <- c(
    "E. H. PARKER" = "Parker, E. H.",
    "Thos. W. KINGSMILL" = "Kingsmill, T. W.",
    "Siren, 0." = "Siren, O.",
    "T., C. B." = "T. C. B.",
    "Fishcher, E. S." = "Fischer, E. S.",
    "Edgins, J." = "Edkins, J.",
    "Zwehtkoff, P., Trans. Carles, W. R." = "Carles, W. R."
  )
  matched <- match(x, names(aliases))
  x[!is.na(matched)] <- unname(aliases[matched[!is.na(matched)]])
  squish(x)
}

extract_year <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  m <- regexpr("\\d{4}", x, perl = TRUE)
  out <- rep(NA_integer_, length(x))
  ok <- m > 0
  out[ok] <- as.integer(substr(x[ok], m[ok], m[ok] + 3))
  out
}

df <- df_raw
df$master_id <- as.character(df$master_id)
missing_master_id <- is.na(df$master_id) | trimws(df$master_id) == ""
if (any(missing_master_id)) {
  df$master_id[missing_master_id] <- paste0("INDEX_", sprintf("%05d", which(missing_master_id)))
}
df$author_raw <- normalize_author_name(df$author)
df$subject_raw <- squish(df$subject)
df$title <- squish(df$title)
df$notes <- squish(df$notes)
df$year_start <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(df$year_start))
df$year_end <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(df$year_end))

year_from_year_col <- extract_year(df$year)
df$year_start[is.na(df$year_start)] <- year_from_year_col[is.na(df$year_start)]
df$year_end[is.na(df$year_end)] <- df$year_start[is.na(df$year_end)]
df$year_end[df$year_end < df$year_start] <- df$year_start[df$year_end < df$year_start]
```

```{r}
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 3. Define time windows
#    Analysis uses the full available journal range.
# ------------------------------------------------------------

window_size <- 10
base_year <- 1858
network_end_year <- max(df$year_end, df$year_start, na.rm = TRUE)
journal_year_span <- paste0(min(df$year_start, na.rm = TRUE), "-", network_end_year)

df$time_window_start <- base_year + floor((df$year_start - base_year) / window_size) * window_size
df$time_window_end <- pmin(df$time_window_start + window_size - 1, network_end_year)
final_partial <- df$time_window_start == network_end_year & df$time_window_start > base_year
if (any(final_partial, na.rm = TRUE)) {
  df$time_window_start[final_partial] <- df$time_window_start[final_partial] - window_size
  df$time_window_end[final_partial] <- network_end_year
}
df$time_window <- paste0(df$time_window_start, "-", df$time_window_end)
```

```{r}
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 4. Subject splitting and LCSH normalization
# ------------------------------------------------------------

normalize_subject <- function(x) {
  x <- ifelse(is.na(x), "", as.character(x))
  x <- tolower(x)
  x <- gsub("[\u2013\u2014]", "-", x, perl = TRUE)
  x <- gsub("\\s+", " ", x, perl = TRUE)
  trimws(x)
}

protected_subjects <- c(
  "associations and institutions",
  "far eastern languages",
  "fine arts",
  "literature and language",
  "political economy",
  "political science",
  "religion of china",
  "science in general",
  "social customs"
)

split_subjects <- function(x) {
  x_norm <- normalize_subject(x)

  if (is.na(x_norm) || x_norm == "") {
    return("unknown")
  }

  if (x_norm %in% protected_subjects) {
    return(x_norm)
  }

  x_norm <- gsub("\\s*,\\s*(and|or|&)\\s+", ", ", x_norm, perl = TRUE)
  x_norm <- gsub("\\s*;\\s*(and|or|&)\\s+", "; ", x_norm, perl = TRUE)

  parts <- unlist(strsplit(
    x_norm,
    "\\s*,\\s*|\\s*;\\s*|\\s*:\\s*|\\s+-\\s+|\\s+and\\s+|\\s*&\\s*",
    perl = TRUE
  ))
  parts <- trimws(gsub("^(and|or)\\b\\s*|^&\\s*", "", parts, perl = TRUE))
  parts <- unique(parts[parts != ""])

  if (length(parts) == 0) {
    return("unknown")
  }

  parts
}

lcsh_subject_mapping <- data.frame(
  subject_split = c(
    "agriculture", "ancient history", "anthropology", "antiquities", "archaeology",
    "architecture", "arts", "asia", "associations and institutions", "astronomy",
    "biographical history", "biography", "botany", "bronze", "buddhism",
    "chemistry", "christianity", "chronology", "coinage", "communications",
    "confucianism", "contemporary history", "decorative arts", "economics",
    "education", "ethnology", "far eastern languages", "fine arts", "folklore",
    "general descriptions", "geography", "geology", "government", "history",
    "hydrology", "individuals of history", "industry", "inscriptions", "islam",
    "judaism", "language", "languages", "law", "literature",
    "literature and language", "medicine", "meteorology", "military", "minor arts",
    "miscellaneous", "modern history", "mohammedanism", "music", "mythology",
    "navigation", "numismatics", "painting", "philosophy", "political economy",
    "political science", "political theory", "porcelain", "religion",
    "religion of china", "science in general", "sculpture", "social customs",
    "taoism", "trade", "travel", "travels", "unknown", "zoology"
  ),
  subject_l2 = c(
    "Agriculture", "History, Ancient", "Anthropology", "Antiquities", "Archaeology",
    "Architecture", "Art", "Asia", "Associations, institutions, etc.", "Astronomy",
    "Biography", "Biography", "Botany", "Bronzes", "Buddhism",
    "Chemistry", "Christianity", "Chronology, Historical", "Numismatics", "Telecommunication",
    "Confucianism", "History, Modern (20th century)", "Decorative arts", "Economics",
    "Education", "Ethnology", "East Asian languages", "Art", "Folklore",
    "Travel", "Geography", "Geology", "Government", "History",
    "Hydrology", "Biography", "Industries", "Unknown", "Islam",
    "Judaism", "Language and languages", "Language and languages", "Law", "Literature",
    "Language and languages", "Medicine", "Meteorology", "Military art and science", "Decorative arts",
    "Unknown", "History, Modern", "Islam", "Music", "Mythology",
    "Navigation", "Numismatics", "Painting", "Philosophy", "Economics",
    "Political science", "Political science--Philosophy", "Porcelain", "Religion",
    "China--Religion", "Science", "Sculpture", "Manners and customs",
    "Taoism", "Commerce", "Travel", "Travel", "Unknown", "Zoology"
  ),
  subject_l1 = c(
    "Natural Sciences", "History and Chronology", "Anthropology and Social Customs", "Arts and Archaeology", "Arts and Archaeology",
    "Arts and Archaeology", "Arts and Archaeology", "Geography and Travel", "Politics, Government, and Law", "Natural Sciences",
    "History and Chronology", "History and Chronology", "Natural Sciences", "Arts and Archaeology", "Religion and Philosophy",
    "Natural Sciences", "Religion and Philosophy", "History and Chronology", "Arts and Archaeology", "Economy, Trade, and Technology",
    "Religion and Philosophy", "History and Chronology", "Arts and Archaeology", "Economy, Trade, and Technology",
    "Education", "Anthropology and Social Customs", "Literature and Language", "Arts and Archaeology", "Anthropology and Social Customs",
    "Geography and Travel", "Geography and Travel", "Natural Sciences", "Politics, Government, and Law", "History and Chronology",
    "Natural Sciences", "History and Chronology", "Economy, Trade, and Technology", "Unknown", "Religion and Philosophy",
    "Religion and Philosophy", "Literature and Language", "Literature and Language", "Politics, Government, and Law", "Literature and Language",
    "Literature and Language", "Natural Sciences", "Natural Sciences", "Military", "Arts and Archaeology",
    "Unknown", "History and Chronology", "Religion and Philosophy", "Arts and Archaeology", "Anthropology and Social Customs",
    "Geography and Travel", "Arts and Archaeology", "Arts and Archaeology", "Religion and Philosophy", "Economy, Trade, and Technology",
    "Politics, Government, and Law", "Politics, Government, and Law", "Arts and Archaeology", "Religion and Philosophy",
    "Religion and Philosophy", "Natural Sciences", "Arts and Archaeology", "Anthropology and Social Customs",
    "Religion and Philosophy", "Economy, Trade, and Technology", "Geography and Travel", "Geography and Travel", "Unknown", "Natural Sciences"
  ),
  mapping_note = c(
    "", "", "", "", "",
    "", "LCSH standard form", "", "LCSH standard form", "",
    "", "", "", "LCSH standard form", "",
    "", "", "LCSH standard form", "LCSH standard form", "LCSH standard form",
    "", "Use 20th century, not docx 21st century", "", "",
    "", "", "LCSH standard form", "LCSH standard form", "",
    "Merged with travel", "", "", "", "",
    "", "", "LCSH standard form", "User-reviewed as Unknown", "",
    "", "LCSH standard form", "LCSH standard form", "", "",
    "Protected compound mapped to LCSH language term", "", "", "LCSH standard form", "LCSH standard form",
    "User-reviewed as Unknown", "", "LCSH updated term", "", "",
    "", "", "", "", "User-reviewed category",
    "", "LCSH-style subdivision", "", "",
    "ASCII form of China--Religion", "", "", "LCSH standard form",
    "", "LCSH standard form", "", "", "Blank or unmapped subject", ""
  ),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

lcsh_subject_mapping$subject_split <- normalize_subject(lcsh_subject_mapping$subject_split)
```

```{r}
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 5. Expand article-subject rows and apply reviewed LCSH mapping
# ------------------------------------------------------------

subject_split_list <- lapply(df$subject_raw, split_subjects)
row_index <- rep(seq_len(nrow(df)), lengths(subject_split_list))
df_subject_expanded <- df[row_index, , drop = FALSE]
rownames(df_subject_expanded) <- NULL
df_subject_expanded$subject_split <- normalize_subject(unlist(subject_split_list, use.names = FALSE))
df_subject_expanded$subject_raw_norm <- normalize_subject(df_subject_expanded$subject_raw)

map_idx <- match(df_subject_expanded$subject_split, lcsh_subject_mapping$subject_split)
df_subject_expanded$subject_l2 <- lcsh_subject_mapping$subject_l2[map_idx]
df_subject_expanded$subject_l1 <- lcsh_subject_mapping$subject_l1[map_idx]
df_subject_expanded$mapping_note <- lcsh_subject_mapping$mapping_note[map_idx]

df_subject_expanded$subject_l2[is.na(df_subject_expanded$subject_l2)] <- "Unknown"
df_subject_expanded$subject_l1[is.na(df_subject_expanded$subject_l1)] <- "Unknown"
df_subject_expanded$mapping_note[is.na(df_subject_expanded$mapping_note)] <- "No reviewed LCSH rule; assigned Unknown"

df_subject_expanded <- df_subject_expanded[
  !duplicated(paste(df_subject_expanded$master_id, df_subject_expanded$subject_l2, sep = "\r")),
]
rownames(df_subject_expanded) <- NULL

subject_mapping_lcsh_review <- aggregate(
  rep(1, nrow(df_subject_expanded)),
  by = df_subject_expanded[c("subject_raw", "subject_raw_norm", "subject_split", "subject_l2", "subject_l1", "mapping_note")],
  FUN = sum
)
names(subject_mapping_lcsh_review)[ncol(subject_mapping_lcsh_review)] <- "article_rows"
subject_mapping_lcsh_review <- subject_mapping_lcsh_review[order(-subject_mapping_lcsh_review$article_rows), ]

write.csv(
  subject_mapping_lcsh_review,
  file.path(output_dir, paste0("subject_mapping_lcsh_review", output_suffix, ".csv")),
  row.names = FALSE,
  fileEncoding = "UTF-8"
)
```

```{r}
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 6. Export expanded CSV with new LCSH subjects
#    This overwrites the selected CSV; the original is backed up once.
# ------------------------------------------------------------

all_counts <- tapply(df_subject_expanded$subject_l2, df_subject_expanded$master_id, function(x) length(unique(x)))
network_rows_for_count <- df_subject_expanded$subject_l2 != "Unknown"
network_counts <- tapply(
  df_subject_expanded$subject_l2[network_rows_for_count],
  df_subject_expanded$master_id[network_rows_for_count],
  function(x) length(unique(x))
)

df_subject_expanded$n_subjects_article_all <- as.integer(all_counts[df_subject_expanded$master_id])
df_subject_expanded$n_subjects_article_network <- as.integer(network_counts[df_subject_expanded$master_id])
df_subject_expanded$n_subjects_article_network[is.na(df_subject_expanded$n_subjects_article_network)] <- 0L
df_subject_expanded$subject_weight <- ifelse(
  df_subject_expanded$subject_l2 == "Unknown" | df_subject_expanded$n_subjects_article_network == 0,
  0,
  1 / df_subject_expanded$n_subjects_article_network
)

df_subject_export <- df_subject_expanded[c(
  "master_id", "year", "volume", "author", "author_raw",
  "subject_l1", "subject_l2", "subject_raw", "subject_raw_norm", "subject_split",
  "title", "year_start", "year_end", "notes", "time_window",
  "n_subjects_article_all", "n_subjects_article_network", "subject_weight", "mapping_note"
)]
df_subject_export$subject <- df_subject_export$subject_l2
df_subject_export <- df_subject_export[c(
  "master_id", "year", "volume", "author", "author_raw",
  "subject", "subject_l1", "subject_l2", "subject_raw", "subject_raw_norm", "subject_split",
  "title", "year_start", "year_end", "notes", "time_window",
  "n_subjects_article_all", "n_subjects_article_network", "subject_weight", "mapping_note"
)]

write.csv(df_subject_export, file_in, row.names = FALSE, fileEncoding = "UTF-8")
```

```{r}
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 7. Build author and subject nodes
#    Unknown subjects are excluded.
# ------------------------------------------------------------

df_network <- df_subject_expanded[
  df_subject_expanded$subject_l1 != "Unknown" &
    df_subject_expanded$subject_l2 != "Unknown" &
    !is.na(df_subject_expanded$author_raw) &
    df_subject_expanded$author_raw != "",
]

author_labels <- unique(df_network$author_raw)
author_nodes <- data.frame(
  node_id = paste0("A_", seq_along(author_labels)),
  node_label = author_labels,
  node_type = "author",
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
author_nodes$first_year <- sapply(author_labels, function(a) min(df_network$year_start[df_network$author_raw == a], na.rm = TRUE))
author_nodes$last_year <- sapply(author_labels, function(a) max(df_network$year_end[df_network$author_raw == a], na.rm = TRUE))
author_nodes$article_count <- sapply(author_labels, function(a) length(unique(df_network$master_id[df_network$author_raw == a])))
author_nodes$subject_count <- sapply(author_labels, function(a) length(unique(df_network$subject_l2[df_network$author_raw == a])))
author_nodes$subject_l1 <- NA_character_
author_nodes$author_count <- NA_integer_

subject_pairs <- unique(df_network[c("subject_l2", "subject_l1")])
subject_nodes <- data.frame(
  node_id = paste0("S_", seq_len(nrow(subject_pairs))),
  node_label = subject_pairs$subject_l2,
  node_type = "subject",
  subject_l1 = subject_pairs$subject_l1,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
subject_nodes$first_year <- sapply(subject_nodes$node_label, function(s) min(df_network$year_start[df_network$subject_l2 == s], na.rm = TRUE))
subject_nodes$last_year <- sapply(subject_nodes$node_label, function(s) max(df_network$year_end[df_network$subject_l2 == s], na.rm = TRUE))
subject_nodes$article_count <- sapply(subject_nodes$node_label, function(s) length(unique(df_network$master_id[df_network$subject_l2 == s])))
subject_nodes$author_count <- sapply(subject_nodes$node_label, function(s) length(unique(df_network$author_raw[df_network$subject_l2 == s])))
subject_nodes$subject_count <- NA_integer_

nodes <- rbind(
  author_nodes[c("node_id", "node_label", "node_type", "first_year", "last_year", "article_count", "subject_count", "subject_l1", "author_count")],
  subject_nodes[c("node_id", "node_label", "node_type", "first_year", "last_year", "article_count", "subject_count", "subject_l1", "author_count")]
)
```

```{r}
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 8. Build author-subject-time edges
# ------------------------------------------------------------

edges_article_level <- data.frame(
  from = author_nodes$node_id[match(df_network$author_raw, author_nodes$node_label)],
  to = subject_nodes$node_id[match(df_network$subject_l2, subject_nodes$node_label)],
  author = df_network$author_raw,
  subject_l2 = df_network$subject_l2,
  subject_l1 = df_network$subject_l1,
  master_id = df_network$master_id,
  title = df_network$title,
  volume = df_network$volume,
  year_start = df_network$year_start,
  year_end = df_network$year_end,
  time_window = df_network$time_window,
  subject_weight = df_network$subject_weight,
  subject_raw = df_network$subject_raw,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

edge_groups <- split(
  edges_article_level,
  interaction(
    edges_article_level$from,
    edges_article_level$to,
    edges_article_level$author,
    edges_article_level$subject_l2,
    edges_article_level$subject_l1,
    edges_article_level$time_window,
    drop = TRUE,
    sep = "\r"
  )
)

edges_ast <- do.call(rbind, lapply(edge_groups, function(x) {
  data.frame(
    from = x$from[1],
    to = x$to[1],
    author = x$author[1],
    subject_l2 = x$subject_l2[1],
    subject_l1 = x$subject_l1[1],
    time_window = x$time_window[1],
    article_count = length(unique(x$master_id)),
    weight = sum(x$subject_weight, na.rm = TRUE),
    first_year = min(x$year_start, na.rm = TRUE),
    last_year = max(x$year_end, na.rm = TRUE),
    titles = paste(unique(x$title), collapse = " | "),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}))
rownames(edges_ast) <- NULL

write.csv(nodes, file.path(output_dir, paste0("network_nodes_author_subject_lcsh", output_suffix, ".csv")), row.names = FALSE, fileEncoding = "UTF-8")
write.csv(edges_article_level, file.path(output_dir, paste0("network_edges_article_level_lcsh", output_suffix, ".csv")), row.names = FALSE, fileEncoding = "UTF-8")
write.csv(edges_ast, file.path(output_dir, paste0("network_edges_author_subject_time_lcsh", output_suffix, ".csv")), row.names = FALSE, fileEncoding = "UTF-8")
```

```{r}
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 9. Build standalone interactive HTML
#    No external JavaScript libraries are required.
# ------------------------------------------------------------

html_path <- file.path(output_dir, paste0("author_subject_network_lcsh_interactive", output_suffix, ".html"))
bundle_dir <- file.path(output_dir, paste0("ras-author-subject-network", output_suffix))
bundle_path <- file.path(bundle_dir, "index.html")

if (!dir.exists(bundle_dir)) {
  dir.create(bundle_dir, recursive = TRUE)
}

json_escape <- function(x) {
  x <- ifelse(is.na(x), "", as.character(x))
  x <- gsub("\\\\", "\\\\\\\\", x, perl = TRUE)
  x <- gsub("\"", "\\\\\"", x, perl = TRUE)
  x <- gsub("\r", "\\\\r", x, perl = TRUE)
  x <- gsub("\n", "\\\\n", x, perl = TRUE)
  x <- gsub("\t", "\\\\t", x, perl = TRUE)
  paste0("\"", x, "\"")
}

json_number <- function(x) {
  x <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))
  ifelse(is.na(x), "null", as.character(x))
}

node_to_json <- function(x) {
  paste0(
    "{",
    "\"id\":", json_escape(x$node_id), ",",
    "\"label\":", json_escape(x$node_label), ",",
    "\"type\":", json_escape(x$node_type), ",",
    "\"subject_l1\":", json_escape(x$subject_l1), ",",
    "\"article_count\":", json_number(x$article_count), ",",
    "\"subject_count\":", json_number(x$subject_count), ",",
    "\"author_count\":", json_number(x$author_count),
    "}"
  )
}

edge_to_json <- function(x) {
  paste0(
    "{",
    "\"from\":", json_escape(x$from), ",",
    "\"to\":", json_escape(x$to), ",",
    "\"author\":", json_escape(x$author), ",",
    "\"subject_l2\":", json_escape(x$subject_l2), ",",
    "\"subject_l1\":", json_escape(x$subject_l1), ",",
    "\"master_id\":", json_escape(x$master_id), ",",
    "\"title\":", json_escape(x$title), ",",
    "\"volume\":", json_escape(x$volume), ",",
    "\"year_start\":", json_number(x$year_start), ",",
    "\"year_end\":", json_number(x$year_end), ",",
    "\"time_window\":", json_escape(x$time_window), ",",
    "\"weight\":", json_number(x$subject_weight),
    "}"
  )
}

nodes_json <- paste0("[", paste(vapply(split(nodes, seq_len(nrow(nodes))), node_to_json, character(1)), collapse = ","), "]")
edges_json <- paste0("[", paste(vapply(split(edges_article_level, seq_len(nrow(edges_article_level))), edge_to_json, character(1)), collapse = ","), "]")

df_author_all <- df_subject_expanded[
  !is.na(df_subject_expanded$author_raw) &
    df_subject_expanded$author_raw != "",
]

author_article_rows <- do.call(rbind, lapply(split(df_author_all, interaction(df_author_all$author_raw, df_author_all$master_id, drop = TRUE, sep = "\r")), function(x) {
  subject_l2 <- unique(x$subject_l2[x$subject_l2 != "Unknown" & !is.na(x$subject_l2)])
  subject_l1 <- unique(x$subject_l1[x$subject_l1 != "Unknown" & !is.na(x$subject_l1)])
  data.frame(
    author = x$author_raw[1],
    master_id = x$master_id[1],
    title = x$title[1],
    volume = x$volume[1],
    year_start = x$year_start[1],
    year_end = x$year_end[1],
    time_window = x$time_window[1],
    subject_l2 = paste(subject_l2, collapse = "; "),
    subject_l1 = paste(subject_l1, collapse = "; "),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}))
rownames(author_article_rows) <- NULL
author_article_rows <- author_article_rows[order(author_article_rows$author, author_article_rows$year_start, author_article_rows$title), ]

author_stats <- do.call(rbind, lapply(split(df_author_all, df_author_all$author_raw), function(x) {
  data.frame(
    author = x$author_raw[1],
    article_count = length(unique(x$master_id)),
    subject_count = length(unique(x$subject_l2[x$subject_l2 != "Unknown" & !is.na(x$subject_l2)])),
    first_year = min(x$year_start, na.rm = TRUE),
    last_year = max(x$year_end, na.rm = TRUE),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}))
rownames(author_stats) <- NULL
author_stats <- author_stats[order(-author_stats$article_count, author_stats$author), ]

author_stat_to_json <- function(x) {
  paste0(
    "{",
    "\"author\":", json_escape(x$author), ",",
    "\"article_count\":", json_number(x$article_count), ",",
    "\"subject_count\":", json_number(x$subject_count), ",",
    "\"first_year\":", json_number(x$first_year), ",",
    "\"last_year\":", json_number(x$last_year),
    "}"
  )
}

author_article_to_json <- function(x) {
  paste0(
    "{",
    "\"author\":", json_escape(x$author), ",",
    "\"master_id\":", json_escape(x$master_id), ",",
    "\"title\":", json_escape(x$title), ",",
    "\"volume\":", json_escape(x$volume), ",",
    "\"year_start\":", json_number(x$year_start), ",",
    "\"year_end\":", json_number(x$year_end), ",",
    "\"time_window\":", json_escape(x$time_window), ",",
    "\"subject_l2\":", json_escape(x$subject_l2), ",",
    "\"subject_l1\":", json_escape(x$subject_l1),
    "}"
  )
}

author_stats_json <- paste0("[", paste(vapply(split(author_stats, seq_len(nrow(author_stats))), author_stat_to_json, character(1)), collapse = ","), "]")
author_articles_json <- paste0("[", paste(vapply(split(author_article_rows, seq_len(nrow(author_article_rows))), author_article_to_json, character(1)), collapse = ","), "]")

html <- c(
'<!doctype html>',
'<html lang="en">',
'<head>',
'<meta charset="utf-8">',
'<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">',
paste0('<title>RAS Author-Subject Network, ', journal_year_span, '</title>'),
'<style>',
':root { color-scheme: light; --ink:#19212a; --muted:#667085; --line:#d7dee8; --panel:#f7f9fc; --accent:#1f6f78; --author:#2f5d8c; }',
'* { box-sizing: border-box; }',
'body { margin:0; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; color:var(--ink); background:#ffffff; }',
'.app { min-height:100vh; display:grid; grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) 360px; }',
'.stage { display:flex; flex-direction:column; min-width:0; border-right:1px solid var(--line); }',
'.topbar { padding:14px 18px 10px; border-bottom:1px solid var(--line); background:#fff; }',
'.title { margin:0; font-size:19px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:0; }',
'.meta { margin-top:4px; color:var(--muted); font-size:12px; }',
'.tabs { display:flex; gap:6px; margin-top:12px; }',
'.tab { width:auto; height:32px; padding:0 12px; border:1px solid var(--line); border-radius:6px; background:#fff; color:#263241; cursor:pointer; font-weight:600; }',
'.tab.active { background:#e7f2f3; border-color:#91b8bd; color:#174c54; }',
'.controls { display:grid; grid-template-columns: 1.1fr 0.9fr 0.9fr auto auto; gap:8px; align-items:end; margin-top:12px; }',
'label { display:block; color:var(--muted); font-size:11px; margin-bottom:4px; }',
'input, select, button { width:100%; height:34px; border:1px solid var(--line); border-radius:6px; background:#fff; color:var(--ink); font-size:13px; padding:0 10px; }',
'button { cursor:pointer; background:#f3f7f8; font-weight:600; }',
'button:hover { background:#e8f1f2; }',
'.canvas-wrap { position:relative; flex:1; min-height:620px; background:#fbfcfe; }',
'.all-authors-wrap { display:none; flex:1; min-height:620px; overflow:auto; padding:18px; background:#fbfcfe; }',
'.author-stat-row { display:grid; grid-template-columns:minmax(150px, 260px) minmax(0, 1fr) 58px 70px; gap:10px; align-items:center; padding:7px 0; border-bottom:1px solid #edf1f6; font-size:12px; cursor:pointer; }',
'.author-stat-row:hover { background:#f5f8fb; }',
'.author-stat-name { font-weight:600; overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis; white-space:nowrap; }',
'.author-stat-track { height:16px; background:#edf3f7; border:1px solid #dce6ee; border-radius:4px; overflow:hidden; }',
'.author-stat-fill { height:100%; background:#2f5d8c; }',
'.author-stat-num, .author-stat-years { color:var(--muted); text-align:right; }',
'canvas { width:100%; height:100%; display:block; }',
'.hint { position:absolute; left:14px; bottom:12px; color:#6f7b88; font-size:12px; background:rgba(255,255,255,0.86); border:1px solid var(--line); border-radius:6px; padding:7px 9px; }',
'.side { background:#fff; display:flex; flex-direction:column; min-width:0; }',
'.side-head { padding:16px; border-bottom:1px solid var(--line); }',
'.side-title { margin:0; font-size:17px; font-weight:700; overflow-wrap:anywhere; }',
'.side-sub { margin-top:5px; color:var(--muted); font-size:12px; }',
'.stats { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:8px; padding:12px 16px; border-bottom:1px solid var(--line); background:var(--panel); }',
'.stat { background:#fff; border:1px solid var(--line); border-radius:6px; padding:8px; }',
'.stat strong { display:block; font-size:17px; }',
'.stat span { color:var(--muted); font-size:11px; }',
'.author-panel { padding:12px 16px; border-bottom:1px solid var(--line); background:#fff; }',
'.author-panel-title { font-size:12px; font-weight:700; color:#263241; margin-bottom:8px; }',
'.author-bars { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:5px; }',
'.author-bar-row { display:grid; grid-template-columns:minmax(92px, 132px) minmax(0, 1fr) 32px; gap:7px; align-items:center; font-size:11px; color:#3d4754; cursor:pointer; }',
'.author-name { overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis; white-space:nowrap; }',
'.author-track { height:13px; background:#eef3f7; border:1px solid #dde5ee; border-radius:4px; overflow:hidden; }',
'.author-fill { height:100%; background:#2f5d8c; }',
'.author-count { text-align:right; color:var(--muted); }',
'.list { overflow:auto; padding:12px 16px 18px; }',
'.article { border-bottom:1px solid #edf1f6; padding:10px 0; }',
'.article:last-child { border-bottom:0; }',
'.article-title { font-size:13px; line-height:1.35; font-weight:600; }',
'.article-meta { margin-top:5px; color:var(--muted); font-size:12px; line-height:1.35; }',
'.legend { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:6px; padding:10px 18px; border-bottom:1px solid var(--line); background:#fff; }',
'.chip { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:5px; font-size:11px; color:#3d4754; }',
'.dot { width:10px; height:10px; border-radius:50%; display:inline-block; }',
'@media (max-width: 900px) { .app { grid-template-columns:1fr; } .side { min-height:420px; border-top:1px solid var(--line); } .controls { grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; } .canvas-wrap { min-height:520px; } }',
'</style>',
'</head>',
'<body>',
'<div class="app">',
'  <main class="stage">',
'    <div class="topbar">',
paste0('      <h1 class="title">RAS Author-Subject Network, ', journal_year_span, '</h1>'),
'      <div class="meta">Subject-normalized author-subject network. Unknown subjects are excluded.</div>',
'      <div class="tabs">',
'        <button class="tab active" data-view="networkView">Network</button>',
'        <button class="tab" data-view="allAuthorsView">All Authors</button>',
'      </div>',
'      <div class="controls">',
'        <div><label for="search">Search</label><input id="search" type="search" placeholder="Author or LCSH subject"></div>',
'        <div><label for="windowFilter">Time window</label><select id="windowFilter"></select></div>',
'        <div><label for="categoryFilter">Subject area</label><select id="categoryFilter"></select></div>',
'        <div><label>&nbsp;</label><button id="fitBtn">Fit</button></div>',
'        <div><label>&nbsp;</label><button id="resetBtn">Reset</button></div>',
'      </div>',
'    </div>',
'    <div id="legend" class="legend"></div>',
'    <div class="canvas-wrap">',
'      <canvas id="network"></canvas>',
'      <div class="hint">Drag nodes to reposition. Click a node to see article titles, years, and LCSH subjects.</div>',
'    </div>',
'    <div id="allAuthorsView" class="all-authors-wrap"></div>',
'  </main>',
'  <aside class="side">',
'    <div class="side-head">',
'      <h2 id="panelTitle" class="side-title">Select a node</h2>',
'      <div id="panelSub" class="side-sub">Click an author or LCSH subject in the network.</div>',
'    </div>',
'    <div class="stats">',
'      <div class="stat"><strong id="visibleNodeCount">0</strong><span>visible nodes</span></div>',
'      <div class="stat"><strong id="visibleEdgeCount">0</strong><span>visible article links</span></div>',
'    </div>',
'    <div class="author-panel">',
'      <div class="author-panel-title">Top authors by article count</div>',
'      <div id="authorBars" class="author-bars"></div>',
'    </div>',
'    <div id="articleList" class="list"></div>',
'  </aside>',
'</div>',
'<script>',
'const nodes = ', nodes_json, ';',
'const edges = ', edges_json, ';',
'const authorStats = ', author_stats_json, ';',
'const authorArticles = ', author_articles_json, ';',
'const subjectColors = {',
'  "Anthropology and Social Customs":"#7b4f9d",',
'  "Arts and Archaeology":"#b85c38",',
'  "Economy, Trade, and Technology":"#26736b",',
'  "Education":"#677a1f",',
'  "Geography and Travel":"#2271a5",',
'  "History and Chronology":"#8f5a12",',
'  "Literature and Language":"#685bc7",',
'  "Military":"#6b7280",',
'  "Natural Sciences":"#2f855a",',
'  "Politics, Government, and Law":"#9f3a4a",',
'  "Religion and Philosophy":"#b23a71"',
'};',
'const authorColor = "#2f5d8c";',
'const canvas = document.getElementById("network");',
'const ctx = canvas.getContext("2d");',
'const searchEl = document.getElementById("search");',
'const windowFilter = document.getElementById("windowFilter");',
'const categoryFilter = document.getElementById("categoryFilter");',
'const articleList = document.getElementById("articleList");',
'const panelTitle = document.getElementById("panelTitle");',
'const panelSub = document.getElementById("panelSub");',
'const visibleNodeCount = document.getElementById("visibleNodeCount");',
'const visibleEdgeCount = document.getElementById("visibleEdgeCount");',
'const authorBars = document.getElementById("authorBars");',
'const allAuthorsView = document.getElementById("allAuthorsView");',
'const canvasWrap = document.querySelector(".canvas-wrap");',
'const legendEl = document.getElementById("legend");',
'let activeView = "networkView";',
'let width = 0, height = 0, scale = 1, offsetX = 0, offsetY = 0;',
'let dragging = null, selectedId = null, hoverId = null;',
'const nodeById = new Map(nodes.map(n => [n.id, n]));',
'const degree = new Map();',
'edges.forEach(e => { degree.set(e.from, (degree.get(e.from)||0)+1); degree.set(e.to, (degree.get(e.to)||0)+1); });',
'nodes.forEach((n, i) => {',
'  const ring = n.type === "subject" ? 0.32 : 0.46;',
'  const angle = (i / nodes.length) * Math.PI * 2;',
'  n.x = Math.cos(angle) * ring;',
'  n.y = Math.sin(angle) * ring;',
'  n.vx = 0; n.vy = 0; n.fixed = false;',
'});',
'function uniq(arr) { return Array.from(new Set(arr)).sort(); }',
'function optionize(select, values, allLabel) {',
'  select.innerHTML = "";',
'  const all = document.createElement("option"); all.value = ""; all.textContent = allLabel; select.appendChild(all);',
'  values.forEach(v => { const o = document.createElement("option"); o.value = v; o.textContent = v; select.appendChild(o); });',
'}',
'optionize(windowFilter, uniq(edges.map(e => e.time_window)), "All windows");',
'optionize(categoryFilter, uniq(edges.map(e => e.subject_l1)), "All subject areas");',
'const legend = document.getElementById("legend");',
'Object.entries(subjectColors).forEach(([label, color]) => {',
'  const chip = document.createElement("span"); chip.className = "chip";',
'  chip.innerHTML = `<span class="dot" style="background:${color}"></span>${label}`;',
'  legend.appendChild(chip);',
'});',
'function filteredEdges() {',
'  const q = searchEl.value.trim().toLowerCase();',
'  return edges.filter(e => {',
'    if (windowFilter.value && e.time_window !== windowFilter.value) return false;',
'    if (categoryFilter.value && e.subject_l1 !== categoryFilter.value) return false;',
'    if (q && !(e.author.toLowerCase().includes(q) || e.subject_l2.toLowerCase().includes(q) || e.title.toLowerCase().includes(q))) return false;',
'    return true;',
'  });',
'}',
'function visibleData() {',
'  const fe = filteredEdges();',
'  const ids = new Set(); fe.forEach(e => { ids.add(e.from); ids.add(e.to); });',
'  const vn = nodes.filter(n => ids.has(n.id));',
'  return {vn, fe, ids};',
'}',
'function radius(n) { return Math.max(4, Math.min(18, 4 + Math.sqrt(degree.get(n.id)||1) * (n.type === "subject" ? 1.2 : 0.8))); }',
'function color(n) { return n.type === "author" ? authorColor : (subjectColors[n.subject_l1] || "#666"); }',
'function resize() {',
'  const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();',
'  const dpr = window.devicePixelRatio || 1;',
'  width = rect.width; height = rect.height;',
'  canvas.width = Math.max(1, Math.floor(width * dpr)); canvas.height = Math.max(1, Math.floor(height * dpr));',
'  ctx.setTransform(dpr, 0, 0, dpr, 0, 0);',
'  fit(false);',
'}',
'function worldToScreen(n) { return {x: width/2 + offsetX + n.x * scale, y: height/2 + offsetY + n.y * scale}; }',
'function screenToWorld(x, y) { return {x:(x - width/2 - offsetX)/scale, y:(y - height/2 - offsetY)/scale}; }',
'function fit(redraw = true) {',
'  const {vn} = visibleData(); if (!vn.length) return;',
'  const xs = vn.map(n => n.x), ys = vn.map(n => n.y);',
'  const minX = Math.min(...xs), maxX = Math.max(...xs), minY = Math.min(...ys), maxY = Math.max(...ys);',
'  scale = Math.min(width / Math.max(0.2, maxX-minX), height / Math.max(0.2, maxY-minY)) * 0.76;',
'  offsetX = -((minX + maxX) / 2) * scale;',
'  offsetY = -((minY + maxY) / 2) * scale;',
'  if (redraw) draw();',
'}',
'function simulate() {',
'  const {vn, fe, ids} = visibleData();',
'  const visibleSet = ids;',
'  for (let step = 0; step < 2; step++) {',
'    for (let i=0; i<vn.length; i++) {',
'      const a = vn[i];',
'      for (let j=i+1; j<vn.length; j++) {',
'        const b = vn[j];',
'        let dx = a.x-b.x, dy = a.y-b.y, d2 = dx*dx+dy*dy+0.002;',
'        const force = 0.00038 / d2;',
'        if (!a.fixed) { a.vx += dx*force; a.vy += dy*force; }',
'        if (!b.fixed) { b.vx -= dx*force; b.vy -= dy*force; }',
'      }',
'    }',
'    fe.forEach(e => {',
'      const a = nodeById.get(e.from), b = nodeById.get(e.to); if (!a || !b) return;',
'      let dx = b.x-a.x, dy = b.y-a.y, d = Math.sqrt(dx*dx+dy*dy)+0.001;',
'      const target = 0.18, f = (d-target)*0.004;',
'      if (!a.fixed) { a.vx += dx/d*f; a.vy += dy/d*f; }',
'      if (!b.fixed) { b.vx -= dx/d*f; b.vy -= dy/d*f; }',
'    });',
'    vn.forEach(n => {',
'      if (!n.fixed) {',
'        n.vx += -n.x * 0.0008; n.vy += -n.y * 0.0008;',
'        n.vx *= 0.82; n.vy *= 0.82;',
'        n.x += n.vx; n.y += n.vy;',
'      }',
'    });',
'  }',
'}',
'function draw() {',
'  const {vn, fe, ids} = visibleData();',
'  ctx.clearRect(0,0,width,height);',
'  visibleNodeCount.textContent = vn.length.toString();',
'  visibleEdgeCount.textContent = fe.length.toString();',
'  ctx.lineWidth = 1;',
'  fe.forEach(e => {',
'    const a = nodeById.get(e.from), b = nodeById.get(e.to); if (!a || !b) return;',
'    const pa = worldToScreen(a), pb = worldToScreen(b);',
'    ctx.strokeStyle = selectedId && (e.from === selectedId || e.to === selectedId) ? "rgba(28,70,86,0.55)" : "rgba(115,131,150,0.18)";',
'    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(pa.x, pa.y); ctx.lineTo(pb.x, pb.y); ctx.stroke();',
'  });',
'  vn.forEach(n => {',
'    const p = worldToScreen(n); const r = radius(n);',
'    const active = n.id === selectedId || n.id === hoverId;',
'    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(p.x, p.y, active ? r+3 : r, 0, Math.PI*2);',
'    ctx.fillStyle = color(n); ctx.globalAlpha = active ? 1 : 0.88; ctx.fill(); ctx.globalAlpha = 1;',
'    ctx.strokeStyle = "#fff"; ctx.lineWidth = active ? 3 : 1.5; ctx.stroke();',
'    if (active || n.type === "subject") {',
'      ctx.font = active ? "bold 12px Arial" : "11px Arial";',
'      ctx.fillStyle = "#1d2733";',
'      ctx.textAlign = "center";',
'      ctx.fillText(n.label.length > 28 ? n.label.slice(0, 27) + "..." : n.label, p.x, p.y - r - 7);',
'    }',
'  });',
'}',
'function articlesForNode(id) {',
'  const relevant = filteredEdges().filter(e => e.from === id || e.to === id);',
'  const seen = new Set();',
'  return relevant.filter(e => { const key = `${e.master_id}|${e.subject_l2}`; if (seen.has(key)) return false; seen.add(key); return true; })',
'    .sort((a,b) => (a.year_start-b.year_start) || a.title.localeCompare(b.title));',
'}',
'function uniqueArticlesForAuthor(author) {',
'  const win = activeView === "allAuthorsView" ? windowFilter.value : "";',
'  return authorArticles.filter(e => e.author === author && (!win || e.time_window === win)).sort((a,b) => (a.year_start-b.year_start) || a.title.localeCompare(b.title));',
'}',
'function showAuthorArticles(author, count) {',
'  const rows = uniqueArticlesForAuthor(author);',
'  panelTitle.textContent = author;',
'  panelSub.textContent = `Author article count: ${count}. Hover another bar or click a network node to change this list.`;',
'  articleList.innerHTML = rows.map(e => {',
'    const vol = e.volume ? `${escapeHtml(e.volume)} - ` : "";',
'    return `<div class="article"><div class="article-title">${escapeHtml(e.title)}</div><div class="article-meta">${vol}${e.year_start} - ${escapeHtml(e.subject_l2)} - ${escapeHtml(e.subject_l1)}</div></div>`;',
'  }).join("") || "<div class=\\"article-meta\\">No articles for this author.</div>";',
'}',
'function renderAuthorBars() {',
'  const rows = authorStats.slice(0, 15).map(r => ({author:r.author, count:Number(r.article_count)}));',
'  const maxCount = Math.max(1, ...rows.map(r => r.count));',
'  authorBars.innerHTML = rows.map(r => `<div class="author-bar-row" data-author="${escapeHtml(r.author)}" data-count="${r.count}" title="${escapeHtml(r.author)}: ${r.count} articles"><div class="author-name">${escapeHtml(r.author)}</div><div class="author-track"><div class="author-fill" style="width:${Math.max(3, r.count/maxCount*100)}%"></div></div><div class="author-count">${r.count}</div></div>`).join("");',
'  authorBars.querySelectorAll(".author-bar-row").forEach(row => row.addEventListener("mouseenter", () => showAuthorArticles(row.dataset.author, row.dataset.count)));',
'}',
'function authorRowsForWindow() {',
'  const win = windowFilter.value;',
'  if (!win) return authorStats.map(r => ({author:r.author, count:Number(r.article_count), subject_count:Number(r.subject_count || 0), first_year:r.first_year, last_year:r.last_year}));',
'  const grouped = new Map();',
'  authorArticles.filter(e => e.time_window === win).forEach(e => {',
'    const old = grouped.get(e.author) || {author:e.author, ids:new Set(), subjects:new Set(), first_year:Number(e.year_start), last_year:Number(e.year_end)};',
'    old.ids.add(e.master_id);',
'    String(e.subject_l2 || "").split(";").map(s => s.trim()).filter(Boolean).forEach(s => old.subjects.add(s));',
'    old.first_year = Math.min(old.first_year, Number(e.year_start));',
'    old.last_year = Math.max(old.last_year, Number(e.year_end));',
'    grouped.set(e.author, old);',
'  });',
'  return Array.from(grouped.values()).map(r => ({author:r.author, count:r.ids.size, subject_count:r.subjects.size, first_year:r.first_year, last_year:r.last_year})).sort((a,b) => b.count-a.count || a.author.localeCompare(b.author));',
'}',
'function renderAllAuthors() {',
'  const q = searchEl.value.trim().toLowerCase();',
'  const rows = authorRowsForWindow().filter(r => !q || r.author.toLowerCase().includes(q));',
'  const maxCount = Math.max(1, ...rows.map(r => Number(r.count || 0)));',
'  allAuthorsView.innerHTML = rows.map(r => `<div class="author-stat-row" data-author="${escapeHtml(r.author)}" data-count="${r.count}" title="${escapeHtml(r.author)}: ${r.count} articles"><div class="author-stat-name">${escapeHtml(r.author)}</div><div class="author-stat-track"><div class="author-stat-fill" style="width:${Math.max(2, Number(r.count || 0)/maxCount*100)}%"></div></div><div class="author-stat-num">${r.count}</div><div class="author-stat-years">${r.first_year}-${r.last_year}</div></div>`).join("");',
'  allAuthorsView.querySelectorAll(".author-stat-row").forEach(row => {',
'    row.addEventListener("mouseenter", () => showAuthorArticles(row.dataset.author, row.dataset.count));',
'    row.addEventListener("click", () => showAuthorArticles(row.dataset.author, row.dataset.count));',
'  });',
'}',
'function setView(view) {',
'  activeView = view;',
'  document.querySelectorAll(".tab").forEach(btn => btn.classList.toggle("active", btn.dataset.view === view));',
'  const networkMode = view === "networkView";',
'  canvasWrap.style.display = networkMode ? "block" : "none";',
'  legendEl.style.display = networkMode ? "flex" : "none";',
'  allAuthorsView.style.display = networkMode ? "none" : "block";',
'  windowFilter.disabled = false;',
'  categoryFilter.disabled = !networkMode;',
'  document.getElementById("fitBtn").disabled = !networkMode;',
'  if (!networkMode) {',
'    panelTitle.textContent = "All Authors";',
'    const rows = authorRowsForWindow();',
'    const win = windowFilter.value || "All windows";',
'    panelSub.textContent = `${rows.length} authors in ${win}. Hover a bar to view article details.`;',
'    visibleNodeCount.textContent = rows.length.toString();',
'    visibleEdgeCount.textContent = rows.reduce((s,r)=>s+Number(r.count || 0),0).toString();',
'    renderAllAuthors();',
'  } else {',
'    fit();',
'    draw();',
'  }',
'}',
'function selectNode(id) {',
'  selectedId = id;',
'  const n = nodeById.get(id);',
'  if (!n) return;',
'  const rows = articlesForNode(id);',
'  panelTitle.textContent = n.label;',
'  panelSub.textContent = n.type === "author" ? `Author · ${rows.length} article-subject links` : `${n.subject_l1} · ${rows.length} article links`;',
'  articleList.innerHTML = "";',
'  if (!rows.length) { articleList.innerHTML = "<div class=\\"article-meta\\">No articles match the current filters.</div>"; draw(); return; }',
'  rows.forEach(e => {',
'    const div = document.createElement("div"); div.className = "article";',
'    const vol = e.volume ? `${escapeHtml(e.volume)} - ` : "";',
'    div.innerHTML = `<div class="article-title">${escapeHtml(e.title)}</div><div class="article-meta">${vol}${e.year_start} - ${escapeHtml(e.subject_l2)} - ${escapeHtml(e.subject_l1)}</div>`;',
'    articleList.appendChild(div);',
'  });',
'  draw();',
'}',
'function escapeHtml(s) { return String(s || "").replace(/[&<>"]/g, c => ({"&":"&amp;","<":"&lt;",">":"&gt;","\\"":"&quot;"}[c])); }',
'function pickNode(x, y) {',
'  const {vn} = visibleData();',
'  for (let i=vn.length-1; i>=0; i--) {',
'    const n = vn[i], p = worldToScreen(n), r = radius(n) + 6;',
'    if ((p.x-x)*(p.x-x) + (p.y-y)*(p.y-y) <= r*r) return n;',
'  }',
'  return null;',
'}',
'canvas.addEventListener("pointerdown", ev => {',
'  const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect(); const x = ev.clientX-rect.left, y = ev.clientY-rect.top;',
'  const n = pickNode(x, y);',
'  if (n) { dragging = n; n.fixed = true; selectNode(n.id); canvas.setPointerCapture(ev.pointerId); }',
'});',
'canvas.addEventListener("pointermove", ev => {',
'  const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect(); const x = ev.clientX-rect.left, y = ev.clientY-rect.top;',
'  if (dragging) { const w = screenToWorld(x, y); dragging.x = w.x; dragging.y = w.y; dragging.vx = 0; dragging.vy = 0; draw(); return; }',
'  const n = pickNode(x, y); hoverId = n ? n.id : null; canvas.style.cursor = n ? "pointer" : "default"; draw();',
'});',
'canvas.addEventListener("pointerup", ev => { if (dragging) { dragging.fixed = false; dragging = null; } });',
'[searchEl, windowFilter, categoryFilter].forEach(el => el.addEventListener("input", () => { selectedId = null; if (activeView === "allAuthorsView") { setView("allAuthorsView"); } else { fit(); draw(); } }));',
'document.getElementById("fitBtn").addEventListener("click", () => fit());',
'document.getElementById("resetBtn").addEventListener("click", () => { searchEl.value = ""; windowFilter.value = ""; categoryFilter.value = ""; selectedId = null; fit(); draw(); });',
'document.querySelectorAll(".tab").forEach(btn => btn.addEventListener("click", () => setView(btn.dataset.view)));',
'window.addEventListener("resize", resize);',
'renderAuthorBars();',
'renderAllAuthors();',
'resize();',
'let ticks = 0;',
'function loop() { if (ticks < 900) { simulate(); ticks++; } draw(); requestAnimationFrame(loop); }',
'loop();',
'</script>',
'</body>',
'</html>'
)

writeLines(html, html_path, useBytes = TRUE)
writeLines(html, bundle_path, useBytes = TRUE)
```
